News

April 2026
Serdar’s paper on minimally invasive e-stim during speech perception got accepted in Hearing Research. Congrats Serdar and all co-authors!

March 2026
Akash successfully defended his thesis! Congratulations Dr. Mishra!

February 2026
Akash is in the news! Read the article here !

November 2025
Congratulations Akash for receiving the ASSFN Fellowship!

November 2025
Sabina got promoted to Assistant Investigator. So well deserved!

September 2025
Jules Granget joined the lab as a postdoc with Jose! Welcome!!

September 2025
Serdar’s speech entrainment paper got accepted in Progress in Neurobiology. Congrats Serdar and all co-authors!

August 2025
Akash’s HFO motifs paper is published in Science Advances. Congrats Akash and all co-authors!

June 2025
Jessica Weber joined the team as a RA!! Welcome!

4/18/2025
Liz succesfully defended her PhD thesis! Congratulations Dr. Espinal!! We are so proud of you! Thanks also go to the outstanding committee: Josh Jacobs, Ash Mehta, Maria Schultheis, Loren Frank. We are grateful for your support and guidance! Your mentors Stephan Bickel, Lila Chrysikou

March 2025
Samruddhi Anikhindi joined the team as a RA with Jose!! Welcome!

1/16/2025
Christine’s abstract to the CNS meeting wins the postdoctoral fellow award. Congrats!

1/10/2025
Akash’s paper: Hippocampal and cortical high frequency oscillations orchestrate human semantic networks during word list memory was accepted for publication in iScience. Congratulations to Akash and everyone involved!

11/15/2024
Akash is in the news, here and here!

10/2024
HBML showings at SFN 2024 in Chicago: - Detecting when the mind wanders off task without self-report using intracranial EEG and eye movements, CB Chesebrough, M Nentwich, A Mehta, S Bickel - Anterior insula activation, the global signal, and their relation to state-related modulation of auditory processing in human intracranial EEG, M Nentwich, CB Chesebrough, N Markowitz, E Freund, A Mehta, S Bickel - Intracranial Responses to Respiratory Challenges in Sensorimotor and Insular cortices are modulated by the Strength and the Perception of the Challenge, JR Herrero, S Bickel, T Similowski, N Mesgarani, A Mehta - Human hippocampal and cortical ripple oscillations as a coordinating mechanism in the processing and memory of continuous, naturalistic stimuli, A Mishra, G Tostaeva, M Nentwich, E Espinal, N Markowitz, S Gherman, A Mehta, S Bickel

August 2024
Max presented his recent work on connectiviity and encoding models at CCN 2024. Congrats, Max!

July 30th 2024
Liz Espinal adds to her growing list of awards. Congrats for the 2024 APA Dissertation Research Award!!

July 28th 2024
Akash’s F30 award application just scored in the 1st percentile!!!! Wow, huge congrats!

May 21st 2024
Isabella Dibenedetto starts as summer student! Welcome!

July 1st 2024
Welcome Sarah Johnson to the team as a new RA!! We’re excited to have you!

June 24th 2024
Welcome Josh Assi who started as a new RA!! We’re excited to have you!

2024
Christine Cheseborough joins the lab as postdoc! Welcome!

January 10th 2024
Sabina’s decision making paper got accepted at Nature Human Behaviour. Congratulations to everyone involved and first and foremost Sabina!

2023
Max Nentwich joins the lab as postdoc! Welcome!

October 4th 2023
Liz gets awarded with the American Psychological Foundation / COGDOP Graduate Research Scholarship. Well deserved!

August 2023
Akash starts the PhD part of his MD PhD program. Let the work begin.

February 17 2023
Gelana is accepted to Mt. Sinai’s PhD program. Congratulations!!

April 26 2022
Serdar Akkol succesfully defended his PhD thesis! Congratulations!!

August 16 2021
Researchers evoke sense of touch through brain implant.

March 10 2020
Elizabeth Espinal is accepted to Drexel University Clinical Psychology Program!

2018
Simon Khuvis defends his PhD thesis!
